title: Police Family
overview: At a Madurai police station, Vinoth—the son of powerful Chennai gangster Dhana—is brutally beaten by four policemen led by SI Raja and secretly dumped outside the city. The next day, he is found murdered.  Blaming the officers, Dhana unleashes ruthless revenge on them and their families. As fear and suspicion close in, SI Raja races to uncover the real killer—before Dhana’s trap destroys everything.  Who truly killed Vinoth?  What was the motive?  The shocking truth erupts in the climax.
